The Technology

272 Medical-Grade Laser Diodes Inside Every Cap

Unlike topical treatments that sit on the surface, red light penetrates deep into your scalp to re-energise follicles at the cellular level.

  • 272 laser + LED diodes for full scalp coverage
  • 650nm wavelength — the proven hair-growth frequency
  • Hands-free & portable — works while you relax
  • No side effects, no chemicals, no pain
  • Works for men & women at any stage of hair loss
  • Visible results in as little as 12 weeks
Simple Process

3 Steps to Fuller Hair

1
🧢

Wear the Cap

Fits like a regular cap. Use it at home, at the office, or during your morning routine.

2
⏱️

20 Minutes Daily

Red light penetrates the scalp, energising dormant follicles and boosting blood flow to the roots.

3
📈

See Results

Reduced shedding in 4–6 weeks. Visible regrowth by week 12. Thousands have seen it work.
